item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 28 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. Closing Old Bugs With Tests: A Dune Contribution Story
  2. ocaml-wire: a Binary wire format DSL with EverParse 3D output
  3. valkey: modern Valkey client for OCaml 5 + Eio, on opam
  4. UnifiedScript_{Std,Top} - literate testing
  5. openrouter_api: An OpenRouter client library
  6. Call for presentations: Caml in the Capital II
